name: Superheavy Samurai Helper
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オタス－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｋ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During damage calculation, if your Defense Position monster battles an opponent's monster while you have no Spells/Traps in your GY (Quick Effect): You can discard this card, then target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control other than the battling monster; your battling monster gains DEF equal to that monster's DEF, during that damage calculation only. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff: During damage calculation, if your Defense Position monster battles an opponent's monster while you have no Spells/Traps in your GY (Quick Effect): You can discard this card, then target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control other than the battling monster; your battling monster gains DEF equal to that monster's DEF, during that damage calculation only. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
eff: During damage calculation, if your Defense Position monster battles an opponent's monster while you have no Spells/Traps in your GY (Quick Effect): You can discard this card, then target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster you control other than the battling monster; your battling monster gains DEF equal to that monster's DEF, during that damage calculation only. When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
Requires having no Traps in Graveyard
